problem id: 8abcff0f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  10111100 -> 11001111
  01011101 -> 11010111
  10010110 -> 01101101
  10010101 -> 01011101
  10100001 -> 00011111
  11000101 -> 01011110
  01011111 -> 11110111
  01010001 -> 00010111
  10110101 -> 01011111
  10000011 -> 00111100

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11110111
